_callStabilityFeeTracking(uint256,addres.details: This is called via try/catch to maintain compatibility with standard UBIFeeSplitter.

params.amount: Token amount to deposit (in collateral token decimals)
gUSD to repay (18 decimals). Use type(uint256).max to repay all.

_callStabilityFeeTracking(uint256,addres.notice: Helper function to call enhanced stability fee tracking.         Attempts to use StableUBIFeeSplitter.splitStabilityFee() if available.

acceptAdmin().notice: Step 2 of the two-step admin transfer.         Must be called by the previously proposed admin. Reverts otherwise.

closeVault(bytes32).notice: Close vault: repay all debt and withdraw all collateral in one call.

depositCollateral(bytes32,uint256).notice: Deposit collateral into caller's vault for `ilk`.

drip(bytes32).notice: Update the per-ilk chi accumulator and collect accrued stability fees.         Must be called before any vault state change.

healthFactor(bytes32,address).notice: Health factor of a vault (WAD-scaled). >= 1e18 is healthy.

ilkDebt(bytes32).notice: ilk -> total actual debt outstanding (in gUSD)

liquidate(bytes32,address).notice: Liquidate an unhealthy vault.         The liquidator does NOT need to provide any funds themselves.         Instead:         1. StabilityPool offsets as much debt as it can (burning pool gUSD).         2. Any remaining debt is repaid by the liquidator directly.         3. Seized collateral (plus penalty) goes to SP first, remainder to liquidator.

mintGUSD(bytes32,uint256).notice: Mint gUSD against collateral in caller's vault.

openVault(bytes32).notice: Open a vault for `ilk`. Vaults are implicitly created on first deposit,         but this function emits an event and validates the ilk exists.

pendingAdmin().notice: Pending admin for the two-step admin transfer (GOO-493).

pendingFee(bytes32).notice: Preview accrued (but not yet dripped) stability fee for an ilk.

repayGUSD(bytes32,uint256).notice: Repay gUSD debt on caller's vault.

transferAdmin(address).notice: Step 1 of the two-step admin transfer (GOO-493).         The current admin proposes a new admin; ownership remains with         the existing admin until the proposed admin calls `acceptAdmin`.

vaultDebt(bytes32,address).notice: Current actual debt for a vault (includes accrued fees).

withdrawCollateral(bytes32,uint256).notice: Withdraw collateral from caller's vault.         Vault must remain healthy after withdrawal.
